ai.page.caption: AI workspace
ai.page.title: AI input and output state
ai.page.description: R9 delivers the launch AI interpolation and AI enhancement loops with RIFE 2x / 4x interpolation plus Real-ESRGAN Standard / Anime, 2x through 16x enhancement, overscale-and-downscale routing, original-audio mergeback, progress feedback, and cancellation cleanup.
ai.page.materials.title: Material list
ai.page.materials.description:
Import the video you want to process,
then choose it from the list.
ai.page.materials.placeholder: Import one or more videos, then lock the current processing target from the material list.
ai.page.workspace.title: AI workspace
ai.page.workspace.description: Switching modes does not affect selected media or the current target.
ai.interpolation.modeDescription: AI interpolation mode: supports 2x and 4x interpolation.
ai.interpolation.trackHint: One video is processed at a time. The current selection is used as the interpolation input.
ai.interpolation.trackEmpty: Select a video from the material list to lock it as the current interpolation input.
ai.interpolation.runtimeNote: The RIFE runtime, model directory, and capability probes are wired in, and the interpolation workflow reuses the current offline package path directly.
ai.interpolation.settings.title: Interpolation settings
ai.interpolation.settings.description: Supports 2x and 4x interpolation, so you can choose what fits your needs.
ai.interpolation.settings.scale.title: Interpolation scale
ai.interpolation.settings.scale.hint: 2x processes faster, while 4x can look smoother but takes longer.
ai.interpolation.settings.device.title: Execution device
ai.interpolation.settings.device.hint.cp: CPU mode is locked in. If CPU fallback is unavailable on this machine, the task will fail clearly before execution starts.
ai.interpolation.settings.device.hint.au: Automatic and GPU preferred both try GPU first for now, then fall back to the RIFE CPU path if GPU is unavailable.
ai.interpolation.settings.uhd.title: UHD mode
ai.interpolation.settings.uhd.hint: Recommended for 4K or higher-resolution sources. It is more stable, but memory usage and processing time both increase noticeably.
ai.interpolation.scaleOption.2x.descript: Single interpolation pass. Best default for the launch build.
ai.interpolation.scaleOption.4x.descript: Built by running two staged 2x passes, with significantly longer processing time.
Try GPU first, then fall back to the RIFE CPU path if GPU is unavailable.
ai.interpolation.deviceOption.gpuPreferr: Uses the same stable GPU-first path as automatic in this round.
ai.interpolation.deviceOption.cpu.descri: Force the RIFE CPU fallback path. It is more compatible, but slower.
ai.interpolation.progress.title: Interpolation progress and latest result
ai.interpolation.progress.placeholder: After interpolation starts, this area shows the current stage, progress, and the latest output result.
ai.interpolation.progress.detail.prepare: Validating the input, runtime, and output path...
ai.interpolation.progress.detail.extract: Unpacking the source video into frame images...
Encoding the interpolated video and merging back the original audio...
ai.interpolation.progress.result.success: Latest interpolation completed: {scale}, {device}, target frame rate {frameRate} fps, output {outputFileName}
ai.interpolation.progress.result.cancell: The latest interpolation task was cancelled.
ai.interpolation.action.hint: Execution automatically extracts frames, runs RIFE, merges back the original audio, and writes the output video. Import, mode switching, and output settings stay locked while processing.
ai.interpolation.failure.invalidInput: The input file path is invalid.
ai.interpolation.failure.inputMissing: The input video does not exist: {path}
ai.interpolation.failure.mediaInfo: Unable to read media details from the input video.
ai.interpolation.failure.noVideoStream: The current input does not contain a video stream that can be interpolated.
ai.interpolation.failure.insufficientFra: Interpolation requires at least two video frames.
ai.interpolation.failure.outputFramesInc: The interpolated frame output is incomplete and the full frame sequence was not generated.
ai.interpolation.failure.runtimeMissing: The RIFE runtime is missing or the directory is incomplete.
ai.interpolation.failure.runtimeModelMis: The RIFE model descriptor is missing.
ai.interpolation.failure.deviceUnavailab: The selected interpolation device strategy is unavailable on this machine.
ai.interpolation.failure.rifeStart: The RIFE process failed to start.
ai.enhancement.modeDescription: AI enhancement mode: supports Standard / Anime and 2x to 16x enhancement.
ai.enhancement.trackHint: One video is processed at a time. The current selection is used as the enhancement input.
ai.enhancement.trackEmpty: Select a video from the material list to lock it as the current enhancement input.
ai.enhancement.runtimeNote: The Real-ESRGAN runtime, model directory, and capability probes are wired in, and the enhancement workflow reuses the current offline package path directly.
ai.enhancement.pending.title: AI enhancement arrives next round
ai.enhancement.pending.description: R8 only ships the AI interpolation workflow. AI enhancement model tiers, scale chaining, and high-load warnings arrive independently in R9.
ai.enhancement.settings.title: Enhancement settings
ai.enhancement.settings.description: R9 wires the launch Real-ESRGAN enhancement loop with Standard / Anime tiers, 2x through 16x scaling, multi-pass chaining, and overscale-then-downscale routing.
ai.enhancement.settings.modelTier.title: Model tier
ai.enhancement.settings.scale.title: Enhancement scale
ai.enhancement.settings.scale.plan.overs: Upscale with {passes} to {upscale}, then downscale back to {target}
Uses realesrgan-x4plus first, with native 4x support.
ai.enhancement.modelTierOption.anime.des: Uses realesr-animevideov3 first, with native 2x / 4x support.
ai.enhancement.scaleOption.standard.desc: Standard tier. The workflow follows the planned enhancement route directly.
ai.enhancement.scaleOption.highLoad.desc: High-load tier. Validate with a small sample first.
ai.enhancement.warning.highLoad.title: High-scale high-load warning
ai.enhancement.warning.highLoad.body: {scale} has reached the high-load threshold. Machine load, VRAM usage, processing time, and failure risk all increase noticeably, so validate with a smaller sample first.
ai.enhancement.action.hint: Execution automatically extracts frames, runs Real-ESRGAN, follows the planned multi-pass or overscale-and-downscale route, merges back the original audio, and writes the output video. Import, mode switching, and output settings stay locked while processing.
ai.enhancement.progress.title: Enhancement progress and latest result
ai.enhancement.progress.placeholder: After enhancement starts, this area shows the current stage, progress, and the latest output result.
ai.enhancement.progress.detail.prepare: Validating the input, runtime, and output path...
ai.enhancement.progress.detail.extract.s: Unpacking the source video into frame images...
ai.enhancement.progress.detail.encode.st: Encoding the enhanced video and merging back the original audio...
Encoding the enhanced video, merging back the original audio, and downscaling from {upscale} to {target}...
ai.enhancement.progress.result.cancelled: The latest enhancement task was cancelled.
ai.enhancement.failure.invalidInput: The input file path is invalid.
ai.enhancement.failure.inputMissing: The input video does not exist: {path}
ai.enhancement.failure.mediaInfo: Unable to read media details from the input video.
ai.enhancement.failure.noVideoStream: The current input does not contain a video stream that can be enhanced.
ai.enhancement.failure.noFrames: Enhancement requires at least one video frame.
ai.enhancement.failure.outputFramesIncom: The enhanced frame output is incomplete and the full frame sequence was not generated.
ai.enhancement.failure.runtimeMissing: The Real-ESRGAN runtime is missing or the directory is incomplete.
ai.enhancement.failure.runtimeModelMissi: The Real-ESRGAN model descriptor is missing.
ai.enhancement.failure.deviceUnavailable: No usable enhancement execution device is available on this machine.
ai.enhancement.failure.realesrganStart: The Real-ESRGAN process failed to start.
ai.page.output.title: Output settings
ai.page.output.description: Configure the output format, folder, and file name.
ai.page.output.format.title: Output format
ai.page.output.directory.title: Output directory
ai.page.output.directory.hint.default: When no folder is chosen manually, output follows the current source directory.
ai.page.output.directory.hint.empty: Select the current processing target to populate the default output directory.
ai.page.output.fileName.title: Output file name
ai.page.output.fileName.hint: When left empty, a suggested file name is generated from the current video and selected mode. The runtime workflow consumes this file-name state directly.
ai.page.output.summary: Current parameter state: mode {mode}, input {input}, output {format}, file name {fileName}, and the original audio track follows the source by default.
ai.page.output.summary.enhancement: Current parameter state: mode {mode}, input {input}, tier {tier}, scale {scale}, plan {plan}, output {format}, file name {fileName}, and the original audio track follows the source by default.
ai.page.processing.title: Execution controls
ai.status.ready: Import one or more videos, then lock the current processing target from the material list.
ai.status.importUnavailable: The current runtime does not have a file picker wired in, so AI video materials cannot be imported right now.
ai.status.importFailed: Video import failed. Please try again.
ai.status.imported: {count} video materials imported. Choose the current processing target from the material list.
ai.status.importedKeepingSelection: {count} video materials imported. The current target remains: {fileName}
ai.status.importSummary: {addedCount} videos imported, {duplicateCount} duplicates skipped, and {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries rejected.
ai.status.importSummaryPendingSelection: {addedCount} videos imported, {duplicateCount} duplicates skipped, and {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries rejected. Choose the current processing target from the material list.
ai.status.importDuplicateAndRejected: No new video materials were added. {duplicateCount} duplicates were skipped and {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries were rejected.
ai.status.duplicateOnly: All selected videos are already in the material list, so nothing was imported again.
ai.status.rejectedOnly: No importable video files were found. {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries were rejected.
ai.status.noProcessable: No importable video files were found.
ai.status.currentInputCleared: Removed from the current input track: {fileName}
ai.status.libraryCleared: The material list is empty. There is no processable video right now.
ai.status.modeChanged: Switched to {mode}. The current processing target was kept.
ai.status.processingLocked: A {mode} task is currently running. Cancel it before you {operation}.
ai.status.outputDirectorySelectionFailed: Choosing the output directory failed. Please try again.
ai.status.outputDirectoryCleared: Output now follows the current source directory again.
ai.status.revealFailed: Revealing the output file failed. Make sure the file still exists.
ai.status.startDeferred: R5 only completes input and output state. It does not start real AI inference; the next round will continue with runtime and execution-chain work.
ai.status.interpolationCancelled: The current AI interpolation task was cancelled and temporary cleanup has started.
ai.status.interpolationCancelling: Cancelling the AI interpolation task and cleaning temporary files...
ai.status.interpolationUnavailable: The current runtime does not have the AI interpolation workflow service wired in yet, so interpolation cannot start.
ai.status.enhancementStarted: AI enhancement started: {fileName}, tier {tier}, target scale {scale}.
ai.status.enhancementCancelled: The current AI enhancement task was cancelled and temporary cleanup has started.
ai.status.enhancementCancelling: Cancelling the AI enhancement task and cleaning temporary files...
ai.status.enhancementUnavailable: The current runtime does not have the AI enhancement workflow service wired in yet, so enhancement cannot start.
ai.status.enhancementDeferred: R8 only ships the AI interpolation workflow. AI enhancement arrives independently in R9.
